articles.title: New monkey species with orange lips found 'hiding' in DRC forest
articles.difficulty_reason: Short wildlife story with a clear narrative and short sentences; mostly B1/B2 vocabulary and very little background knowledge needed.

articles.title: French MPs approve assisted-dying law with strict rules after years of argument
articles.difficulty_reason: Moderate-length news report with some legal and medical vocabulary (B1/B2/C1); clear structure but needs a little background on parliaments and end-of-life debate.

articles.title: More people around the world now favour China over the US, Pew study suggests
articles.difficulty_reason: Dense, analytical piece on geopolitics with long sentences and B2/C1/C2 vocabulary; assumes background knowledge of global affairs and polling.
